title: froelichia nudicaulis subsp. lanigera
intro: Froelichia nudicaulis subsp. lanigera, also known as woolly snake root, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Polygonaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of froelichia nudicaulis subsp. lanigera include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce menstrual cramps. This plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
